speaking_style: Direct and clipped. Military habit — says what needs saying, nothing more.
backstory_seeds: recently discharged or on leave from a local garrison
haunted by something they saw in service
looking for work now that the fighting has moved elsewhere
waiting for orders that may never come
returned from the French campaigns with nothing but scars and a few coins that won't last the month
served under a lord who fell in battle at Crecy and has not found steady employ since
a knight between campaigns with no land, no lord, and no prospect of either in the near term
knows men still fighting in France and wonders most nights whether they made the right choice by coming home
